_meta.description: Tiburon GK common knowledge graph — manual hierarchy, standard values, OEM components
_meta.notes: Seed data from OCR-extracted shop manual and electrical manual. Expand progressively. See schema for full node/edge type definitions.

nodes.label: Engine Mechanical System (2.0 I4)
nodes.notes: I4 content coexists in same MD file as EMA. Filter by chapter prefix.

nodes.label: Specifications Table — Valve Train, Pistons, Crankshaft
nodes.notes: Master standard values table. Cross-reference to specific section procedures.

nodes.label: General Specifications — Ignition, Starter, Alternator, Battery
General Specifications — Sensors, Actuators, Fuel Pressure
Cylinder Bore
nodes.notes: Standard bore for G6BA. Out-of-round limit: 0.02mm. Flatness of gasket surface: max 0.03mm (limit 0.05mm).

nodes.label: TPS Output Voltage at Curb Idle (V6)
Camshaft Position Sensor
nodes.oem_location: Camshaft journal area — top of engine

nodes.label: Knock Sensor
nodes.notes: Two sensors — front bank and rear bank (G6BA)

nodes.label: Vehicle Speed Sensor
nodes.notes: Fans out to: cluster, BCM-JM pin 4, ECU

nodes.label: Ignition Coil (V6)
nodes.notes: OEM: wasted spark (3 coils). White car converted to COP — Toyota 90919-A2005 ×6. See hardware/sensors/cop-ignition.md.

nodes.label: Alternator (Generator)
nodes.notes: Battery voltage sensing type. 95A rated. Exciter wire routed through PDM MP6 on white car.

nodes.label: Starter Motor
nodes.notes: Reduction drive with planetary gear. 1.2 kW, 12V.

nodes.label: Fuel Pressure Regulator
nodes.notes: OEM setpoint: 300 ± 1.5 kPa (3.35 ± 0.06 kg/cm²). White car: Radium FPR/damper to be installed.

nodes.label: Toyota 90919-A2005
nodes.notes: COP conversion for G6BA. Smart coil (internal igniter). Qty: 6. See hardware/sensors/cop-ignition.md.

nodes.label: MFI Control System (2.7L) — O2 Sensors Bank 1
MFI Control System (2.7L) — O2 Sensors Bank 2
Heated Oxygen Sensor — Circuit Diagram & Procedure

edges.note: Diagram on EMA-72, installation instructions on EMA-73
COP conversion — white car only. OEM = wasted spark.
HL is a separate ETM section but linked here for navigation
